aap-mcp-job-management.description: AAP job management: job templates, launches, events, status, workflows, and workflow approvals

aap-mcp-inventory-management.description: AAP inventory management: inventories, hosts, groups, and host facts (ansible_facts)

aap-mcp-configuration.description: AAP configuration: notification templates, execution environments, and platform settings

aap-mcp-security-compliance.description: AAP security and compliance: credentials, credential types, and credential testing

aap-mcp-system-monitoring.description: AAP system monitoring: instance groups, instances, activity stream, platform status, and mesh topology

aap-mcp-user-management.description: AAP user management: users, teams, organizations, role assignments, role definitions, and authenticators
